name: Aries
signature_trait: Bold & Courageous by nature, Aries brings fire energy to every connection — ruled by Mars, their cosmic fingerprint is unmistakable.
description: The fearless pioneer of the zodiac, Aries charges forward with passion and determination.

name: Taurus
signature_trait: Steadfast & Sensual by nature, Taurus brings earth energy to every connection — ruled by Venus, their cosmic fingerprint is unmistakable.
description: The reliable builder who values stability, beauty, and the pleasures of life.

name: Gemini
signature_trait: Witty & Expressive by nature, Gemini brings air energy to every connection — ruled by Mercury, their cosmic fingerprint is unmistakable.
description: The quick-witted communicator who thrives on variety and intellectual stimulation.

name: Cancer
signature_trait: Nurturing & Intuitive by nature, Cancer brings water energy to every connection — ruled by the Moon, their cosmic fingerprint is unmistakable.
description: The compassionate caretaker with deep emotional intelligence and loyalty.

name: Leo
signature_trait: Confident & Generous by nature, Leo brings fire energy to every connection — ruled by the Sun, their cosmic fingerprint is unmistakable.
description: The radiant leader who shines with warmth, creativity, and natural charisma.
